titleStmt.title: SII 26.150: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 150. (A.R. No. 142 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: It records a gift of paddy made by a certain Śirināyakan alias Vīrachōḷa-Nuḷamban who was a member of the temple executive committee to provide daily one uḻakku of oil for a lamp given by the same person to the temple of Vīrachōḻīśvaram-uḍaiyār. In this connection Kaṇṇāḍipputtūr in Kaṟaivaḻināḍu is enjoined to measure out a certain quantity of paddy.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . viracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 21āvatu koyilatikārañ ceyvārkaḷiṟ cirināyakanāna viracoḻaṉuḷampanen Āḻuṭaiyār viracoḻiśva
ramuṭaiyārkku vaitta tiruṉuntāviḷakkonṟukku nāḷonṟukkeṇṇai Uḻakkāka nāḷ munṉūṟṟaṟupatukkeṇṇai toṇṇūṟṟu
nāḻikku Eṇṇai nāḻikku nellut tūṇiyāka nellu muppatin kalattukkup perumāḷ mulapoṟṟeṭṭukku mutalāka Oṭukkiṉa p
paṉniraṇṭukku karaivaḻināṭṭu kkaṇṇāṭipputtūriṟ kaṭamaiyil varicaikkāṇiyākak kārpacānam Aḷakkak kaṭava nel mu
kkuk kūlippānel Irukalane tūṇipatakkum Āka nel muppattirukalane tūṇip patakkukkum Ikkoyilil cikāriyañ ceyvār
viḷakkonṟuñ celuttuvārāka Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.150 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
